PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE OF PETN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH, INC. TALLERICO, LEONARD P

LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS LEONARD TALLERICO, MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED FOR INSUFFIENT PROOF OF SERVICE. DELIVERING THE PAPERS TO A UNITED PARCEL SERVICE (UPS) AGENT FOR DELIVERY IS NOT SUFFICIENT FOR PERSONAL SERVICE. JUDGE:JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA T. PAXTON, CSR #1558
(AMENDED) NTC OF HG OF PETN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH, INC. TALLERICO, LEONARD P
LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITIONER MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH INCORPORATED, AND LEONARD TALLERICO'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH INCORPORATED AND LEONARD TALLERICO'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE-AN "AMENDED" NOTICE WAS SERVED ON 2/17/05 BY MAIL. THIS DOES NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 1005(B). JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

NTC OF HRG OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH, INC. TALLERICO, LEONARD P HEARING SET FOR MAY-13-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITIONERS MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH, INC., LEONARD TALLERICO'S NOTICE OF HEARING OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. PETITIONER'S COUNSEL STATED THAT SERVICE WAS MADE ON MARCH 22, 2005. IF SERVICE IS PROPER, THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION. IF NOT PROPER, THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. PROPOSED ORDER WAS SUBMITTED IN OPEN COURT FOR REVIEW. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN; COURT REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR #1558

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH, INC. TALLERICO, LEONARD P RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT FINFROCK, STEPHEN R SEE SCANNED DOC. TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

RULING:
